comment.body: Wallah I hate it wen some people just hear what they wanna hear and then act like that was the whole point from day1. Almas been saying since Sunday this is a vol trade 1st, not some big directional short. Literally market is mainly focused on defending the downside and bleeding out the puts, cuz JPow was expected to come in with a more hawkish tone. In the end JPow was more dovish than expected. There was no straight bearish call for today. From the moment JPow flipped to dovish, u guyz could’ve seen what was coming, skew trade printed like no tomorrow
